name: worldmap
description: Coastal RPG world map. Spread-out main quests along a sinuous sandy road, sea band at the bottom, hover any main to reveal its constellation of side quests. Click any pin to open a rich quest card with Problem / Solution / Connected quests. Fredoka font, dark outlines, sandy path, palm trees, distant mountains, big landmark pins.
evolution_from: themes/pokemon — same design tokens (Fredoka, ink #2a3a4a, gold #ffd24a, grass #8fc97a, sea #7ec0dc, sand path), but mains spread across a 150px vertical amplitude (190..340) with sea-band coastline + hover-reveal side quests + rich click-card with Connected-quests bidirectional links.
